_comment: Controlled labeled fixture for the deterministic detector layer. POSITIVES assert a detector fires on a known identifier (recall). NEGATIVES are real court-text tokens that must NOT fire (precision) — docket/case numbers, statute cites, ECF refs, bare dates, money. Several negatives are the exact false-positive traps DD-015/DD-016 fixed; they double as regression guards.
